description: Using the 'Sleep' dataset (Student, 1908) already loaded in JASP, perform a Bayesian Independent Samples T-Test. Use 'extra' as the dependent variable and 'group' as the grouping variable. Configure the analysis with a Normal prior distribution (Mean = 0, Standard Deviation = 1). Include sequential analysis plots and descriptive statistics in the output. Save the analysis to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Sleep_Sequential_Bayes.jasp.
